name: Can't Get You Out of My Head
original_name: Can't Get You Out of My Head
overview: In six films, Adam Curtis traces the different forces across the world that have led to now. It covers a wide range—including the strange roots of modern conspiracy theories, the history of China, opium and opioids, the history of Artificial Intelligence, melancholy over the loss of empire and, love and power. And explores whether modern culture, despite its radicalism, is really just part of the new system of power.

trailers.title: Can’t Get You Out of My Head
